Joseph R. Connelly, III, of HAWKINS PARNELL THACKSTON & YOUNG (415-766-3208) appearing for defendant / moving party Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

No objections made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.'s motion to transfer venue to the Superior Court for the County of Shasta and to stay the proceedings pending transfer is granted. Plaintiff does not oppose defendant's motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
